mapper.select: SELECT t.template_id, t.creator_user_id, t.title, t.scene_desc, t.current_version_id, t.price_type, t.price, t.shelf_status, t.use_count, t.favorite_count, t.avg_score, t.review_count, t.created_at, t.updated_at, COALESCE(v.prompt_content, t.scene_desc) AS summary, COALESCE(u.recent_use_count, 0) AS recentUseCount, ROUND( t.avg_score * 20 + COALESCE(u.recent_use_count, 0) * 2 + t.favorite_count * 0.5 + t.use_count * 0.05, 2 ) AS hotScore FROM prompt_template t LEFT JOIN prompt_template_version v ON v.version_id = t.current_version_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT template_id, COUNT(1) AS recent_use_count FROM template_use_log WHERE used_at >= #{startTime} GROUP BY template_id ) u ON u.template_id = t.template_id WHERE t.shelf_status = 'ON_SHELF' ORDER BY hotScore DESC, t.avg_score DESC, t.use_count DESC, t.template_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
